lines.speaker: Picaria
lines.text: Hey there. Here to do some fishing? It's a great place for it. Or are you looking to buy some fishing supplies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you get many customers out here?

lines.speaker: Picaria
lines.text: Not so much out here, but I sell plenty of fish to merchants in the capital. If you buy any fish there, there's a good chance it came from me.

lines.speaker: Picaria
lines.text: So anyway, looking to buy some fishing supplies?
